title: croton fragrans
intro: Croton fragrans, also known as Sweet Spirit, is a tropical plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Croton fragrans lie in its roots, which contain a compound called croton oil, a mixture of diterpenes that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton fragrans include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction and pain relief. Croton fragrans is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in the Philippines and other parts of Asia.
